name: Pisa: Discover the Piazza dei Miracoli

reviews.review_description: This gave me motion sickness. I wasnt able to watch through the whole thing, movement was too fast and bumpy.

With other VR tours in Pisa from the same bundle I got now overall impression of the place, prominent edifices there. Walking through and with the crowds, with people from all over the world, talking in alien tongues, even feeling sea breeze when walking, is a virtually real experience! Interesting thing I have noticed, Chiesa Cattedrale di Pisa is more an art gallery than Chiesa ;))
